headline: Will Leadership Shift and New Collaborations Recast Williams-Sonoma's (WSM) Brand-Led Growth Narrative?
summary: In recent weeks, Williams-Sonoma, Inc. has promoted long-time executive Aujsha Taylor to President of Rejuvenation and expanded brand collaborations across its portfolio, including new partnerships at Williams Sonoma and Pottery Barn Kids that broaden product ranges and deepen lifestyle positioning. Taylor’s track record of more than doubling Rejuvenation’s revenue, alongside fresh collaborations in gourmet food and children’s décor, highlights how Williams-Sonoma is leaning on brand-led...
